mnemonics: D.C. Comics - Dynamic Composition: Think of assembling components dynamically like a comic book artist assembles panels (components) into a full page (page) on the fly.
keyPoints: Dynamic composition builds pages by assembling components at runtime, not during a build process.
It allows for highly personalized and real-time content delivery.
It often relies on client-side JavaScript or server-side includes to fetch and render components.
commonMistakes: Over-fetching data by loading entire components when only a small piece of data is needed.
Forgetting to handle loading states, causing a poor user experience.
Creating components with excessive logic and dependencies, making them difficult to reuse.
